_comment: Example 1b: 5° Offset - Feed and emitter co-located 5° from boresight
_description: Feed steered 5° off-axis (lateral ~1.19m at focal plane). Emitter at ground location 5° from boresight in same direction. Expected gain: 50-55 dBi (sidelobe region, -12 to -17 dB from peak)
_notes: Feed offset shows beam steering capability. Emitter aligned with steered beam.
